name: Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: butter or solid vegetable shortening -- softened
1 teaspoon baking powder (Note: This appears to be a duplicate entry; it should be consolidated)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Lightly grease an 11-by-8-inch baking pan with the butter or shortening.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until mixed.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the milk, oil, and eggs until blended. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix with a fork until just combined; a few lumps are acceptable.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake in the center of the oven for about 35 minutes, or until golden brown and the edges begin to pull away from the sides of the pan. Remove from the oven and allow to cool for 5 to 10 minutes before cutting and serving.
